title: AetheriumCraft: New Tools & New Armor
description: Add new Tools & Armor out of Wolfram & Iridium
body:
Welcome to AetheriumCraft – Forge the Future!
AetheriumCraft is an immersive and lore-friendly Minecraft modification that expands the vanilla experience with powerful new materials, tools, and armor sets. Dive into a world of high-tier progression and discover what it means to become truly unstoppable.

🛠️ What Does AetheriumCraft Add?
🔩 New Materials:

Wolfram (Tungsten) – A dense and durable metal, ideal for crafting high-durability equipment.

Iridium – A rare, radiant resource used in crafting ultra-strong gear and future high-tech items.

🛡️ New Armor Sets:

Wolfram Armor – High defense, increased durability, and impressive knockback resistance.

⛏️ New Tools & Weapons:

Wolfram Pickaxe – Mines faster and lasts longer than diamond, ideal for endgame resource collection.

More tools and custom weaponry coming soon!

💎 Progression-Based Crafting:
Requires you to explore, mine, and unlock stronger equipment as you master the world of Aetherium.

✨ Future Additions (Planned):

Custom dimensions

Unique mobs and bosses

Iridium-based technology

In-game advancements and progression quests

🌍 Client-Server Compatibility
AetheriumCraft is a client and server-side mod. That means it must be installed on both sides to function correctly, as it adds new items, blocks, and game mechanics.

👥 Community & Extras
Join our Discord community to stay updated, give feedback, and download our exclusive Fabric Client, optimized for AetheriumCraft and other mods.

🔗 Join the Discord and download the client here!
